name: opencode-autocomplete
description: AI inline completions routed through the OpenCode Zen (go) OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

opencodeAutocomplete.enabled.description: Master on/off switch for inline suggestions.

opencodeAutocomplete.baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL for the OpenCode Zen provider. Machine-scoped so a workspace cannot redirect requests (and the API key) to another endpoint.

opencodeAutocomplete.model.description: Model id (bare, as served by /models — the endpoint rejects a provider-prefixed id). Run 'OpenCode: List / Choose Model' to discover valid ids.

opencodeAutocomplete.debounceMs.description: Quiet window (ms) after the last keystroke before calling the API.

opencodeAutocomplete.maxTokens.description: Max tokens per suggestion. 0 = no limit (lets multi-line and reasoning-model completions finish). A positive cap bounds latency but can truncate the answer mid-output.

opencodeAutocomplete.temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Low keeps completions deterministic.

opencodeAutocomplete.maxPrefixChars.description: Characters of code before the caret sent as context.

opencodeAutocomplete.maxSuffixChars.description: Characters of code after the caret sent as context.
